'''Ter Abbes''' was a grim industrialized [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Ter Abbes system/Legends|Ter Abbes system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], just off the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. Its government was democratically elected, but prone to instability, as was proven when [[Nom Anor]] contracted [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Goran Beviin]] to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Tholote B'Leph]], an opposition [[Politics/Legends|politician]] just prior to an election. The civil war ignited by his [[Death/Legends|death]] was still in progress in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].<ref name="APM">''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''</ref>

At the time of the meeting of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and Nom Anor on a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]], there was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from Ter Abbes on board. He was taken as a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] and implanted by an experimental [[Yorik-Kul]].<ref name="APM" />
